refined_caption: The hospital food appears to be contaminated and unhygienic. Visible signs of contamination are present on the food.
complaint_description: I was served a meal in the hospital that looked contaminated and unhygienic. The food had visible signs of spoilage and I was concerned about my health and safety. I reported this to the hospital staff immediately.
voice_text: The food they served me in the hospital looks really contaminated and gross, I'm worried about getting sick.
